label: ⛽ Fuel Prices + DinoX
info:
Integrated fuel price monitoring with DinoX MQTT bot.

• Auto-checks prices every 15 minutes
• Sends alerts when prices change beyond threshold
• Manual queries: sprit, e5, e10, diesel, tanken, preise
• Reset stored prices: sprit reset

name: ⚙️ Configuration → Double-click 'Build API URL' node to set API key, stations & thresholds
info:
## Setup

1. Double-click the **Build API URL** node (yellow, center)
2. Set your Tankerkoenig API key
3. Add/remove station UUIDs
4. Set price change thresholds for auto-alerts
5. Double-click MQTT nodes and configure your broker
6. Click Deploy

## Commands (type in DinoX chat)
- **sprit** / **tanken** / **preise** — All prices
- **e5** — Super E5 only
- **e10** — Super E10 only
- **diesel** — Diesel only
- **sprit reset** — Reset stored prices (new baseline)

## Auto-Alerts
Every 15 minutes prices are checked.
If a price changes by more than the configured threshold,
an alert is sent to DinoX automatically.

## Topics
- dinox/chat → receives commands
- dinox/response → sends prices & alerts

name: 🗑 Reset Prices
